hero.title:

hero.subtitle: End-to-end support for EC/D2C brands entering physical retail.

noroshi.title: Noroshi — Retail Expansion Support
noroshi.description: A consulting team that supports EC/D2C brands entering physical retail. From strategy design to buyer negotiations, store placement, and POS analytics — all-in-one support.

tagpo.title: Tagpo — SNS x In-Store Promotion
tagpo.description: Leveraging a trend-savvy member network to simultaneously drive in-store sales and SNS awareness. Adopted as an official promotion program by Welcia, Tsuruha, LOFT, and more.

ctaSection.title: Get in Touch
ctaSection.description: Have questions about retail expansion or SNS x in-store promotion? Feel free to contact us.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: Translate brand language into retail language, and create a 'new form of wholesale.'

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: Through Promotion x Merchandising, we discover attractive products, deliver valuable proposals, and remain a partner that enhances store value.

companyInfo.title: Company Information
companyInfo.name: Company Name
companyInfo.addressValue: Head Office: H¹O Hatchobori #508, 2-3-9 Hatchobori, Chuo-ku, Tokyo 104-0032
companyInfo.businessValue: Retail expansion support (Noroshi), In-store promotion & real affiliate promotion (Tagpo)

intro.title: TONYA's Business Model
intro.text: Manufacturers (EC/D2C brands) have excellent products but face barriers entering physical retail, while retailers are always searching for the 'next hit product.' TONYA stands between them as a 'new wholesaler' that translates brand language into retail language, solving challenges for both sides.

wholesale.title: Wholesale Business
wholesale.description: We purchase products from manufacturers and wholesale them to retailers (drugstores, variety shops, GMS, etc.).

consulting.title: Consulting Business
consulting.description: We provide hands-on support from retail expansion strategy design to execution.

noroshi.title: Noroshi — Retail Expansion Consulting
noroshi.description: A consulting service that provides end-to-end support for EC/D2C brands entering retail markets — from strategy design to buyer negotiations, store placement, and POS analytics.

steps.title: SKU Evaluation & Retail Context Translation
steps.description: Transform product strengths into language and logic that work in retail markets.

steps.title: Retail Strategy & Advertising Design
steps.description: Select target retailers and develop cross-channel advertising strategies spanning in-store and digital.

steps.title: Pitch Preparation & Buyer Action
steps.description: Create buyer-facing proposals and arrange/execute negotiations.

steps.title: Store Placement & POP/SNS Integration
steps.description: Propose shelf allocation, produce POP materials, and deploy SNS-linked campaigns.

steps.title: In-Store Data Analysis & PDCA
steps.description: Analyze POS data and run improvement PDCA cycles for store performance.

steps.title: Success Factor Documentation & Scalability
steps.description: Systematize success patterns to enable expansion to other retailers.

merits.title: Low Risk
merits.description: No large upfront investment required. Start small and validate the retail market.

merits.title: Expert Support
merits.description: Consultants with deep retail experience provide hands-on support from strategy to execution.

merits.title: Cost Efficient
merits.description: Achieve retail expansion at significantly lower cost than building an in-house sales team.

tagpo.title: Tagpo — SNS x In-Store Promotion
tagpo.description: A promotion service that leverages a trend-savvy member network to drive in-store purchases and SNS posts simultaneously. Adopted as an official promotion program by Welcia, Tsuruha, LOFT, and more.
tagpo.howItWorks: Tagpo members purchase products at target stores and post on SNS. By combining purchase data (POS) with SNS data, we simultaneously accelerate in-store sales and expand digital awareness.

effects.title: Accelerated In-Store Sales
effects.description: POS performance at target stores improves, leading to shelf maintenance and expansion.

effects.title: Massive UGC Generation
effects.description: High-quality user-generated content based on real purchase experiences is created at scale.

effects.title: Awareness & Shelf Protection
effects.description: The synergy of SNS awareness and in-store performance reduces the risk of shelf removal.

contact.description: Have questions about retail expansion or SNS x in-store promotion? Please fill out the form below and we will get back to you shortly.

privacy.intro: TONYA Inc. (hereinafter referred to as 'the Company') recognizes the protection of personal information as an important responsibility and establishes the following privacy policy to ensure appropriate management and protection.

sections.title: 1. Definition of Personal Information
sections.content: Personal information refers to information that can identify a specific individual, such as name, address, telephone number, and email address.

sections.title: 2. Collection of Personal Information
sections.content: The Company may collect personal information to the extent necessary for inquiries and service usage. Collection is conducted by lawful and fair means with clear disclosure of the purpose of use.

sections.title: 3. Purpose of Use
sections.content:
Collected personal information will be used for the following purposes:
- Responding to inquiries
- Providing and improving services
- Sending various notifications
- Other related operations

sections.title: 4. Disclosure to Third Parties
sections.content: The Company will not provide personal information to third parties without the customer's consent, except as required by law.

sections.title: 5. Management of Personal Information
sections.content: The Company implements appropriate security measures to prevent leakage, loss, or alteration of personal information.

sections.title: 6. Contact
sections.content: For inquiries regarding the handling of personal information, please contact us through our inquiry form.

brands.lead: Discover the trusted brands that TONYA proudly represents as an authorized distributor.
brands.exclusiveMessage: This brand is supported by TONYA as an authorized distributor for retail market expansion in Japan.
brands.ctaDescription: For questions about distribution terms or product introduction, feel free to contact us.

footer.description: Official website of TONYA Inc., supporting EC/D2C brands' physical retail expansion. New Style Merchandising.
